definition:
1. to begin with, make a beginning of , Lat. auctor esse, with genitive, ἐξῆρχε γόοιο (Iliad by Homer), etc.:—;so in Mid., ἐξήρχετο βουλῆς (Odyssey by Homer) 
2. with accusative, βουλὰς ἐξάρχων (Iliad by Homer);—;also ἐξάρχειν or ἐξάρχεσθαι παιᾶνά τινι to begin  a hymn to one, address  it to him, (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
